name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
Reaction Manager keeps engagement on your channels without the busywork.

• Onboard Account — connect yourself and link a channel
• Create Bot Pool — register bots for a channel (free tier: 10)
• Configure Rules — target %, timing, reply templates
• Monitor Jobs — status, filters, recent activity

Tap /start for the menu. Everything is reachable by buttons.

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
